translations.de: Sie ist ein wirklich nettes Mädchen.
translations.yue: 佢係個真係好好嘅女仔。
translations.pt: Ela é uma garota muito simpática.
translations.tr: O gerçekten çok iyi bir kız.
translations.vi: Cô ấy là một cô gái rất dễ thương.
translations.nl: Ze is een heel aardig meisje.
translations.nb: Hun er en veldig hyggelig jente.
translations.id: Dia adalah cewek yang sangat baik.
translations.sv: Hon är en väldigt trevlig tjej.
translations.da: Hun er en rigtig sød pige.
translations.ja: 彼女はとても優しい女の子です。

tokens.explanation: Clitic demonstrative pronoun 'ce' elided before a vowel; dummy subject in a copular clause.
Copular auxiliary linking the subject to the predicate; 3rd person singular present.
Feminine singular indefinite article modifying 'nana'.
Noun head; informal register referring to a girl or woman.
Degree adverb intensifying the adjective 'sympa'.
Predicate adjective describing 'nana'.

sentences.target: Tu parles de la nana du café.
sentences.reading: /ty paʁl də la nana dy kafe/

translations.fr: Tu parles de la nana du café.
translations.ipa: /ty paʁl də la nana dy kafe/
translations.en: You're talking about the girl from the café.
translations.es: Hablas de la chica de la cafetería.
translations.de: Du sprichst von dem Mädchen aus dem Café.
translations.it: Stai parlando della ragazza del bar.
translations.ko: 카페에 있는 그 여자 얘기하는 거예요.
translations.zh-Hans: 你是在说咖啡馆里的那个女孩。
translations.yue: 你係講咖啡店嗰個女仔。
translations.ru: Ты говоришь о девушке из кафе.
translations.pt: Você está falando da garota da cafeteria.
translations.he: אתה מדבר על הבחורה מהבית קפה.
translations.vi: Bạn đang nói về cô gái ở quán cà phê.
translations.ar: أنت تتحدث عن الفتاة من المقهى.
translations.nl: Je hebt het over het meisje van het café.
translations.uk: Ти говориш про дівчину з кафе.
translations.hi: तुम कैफ़े वाली लड़की की बात कर रहे हो.
translations.el: Μιλάς για το κορίτσι από το καφέ.
translations.nb: Du snakker om jenta fra kafeen.
translations.id: Kamu sedang membicarakan cewek dari kafe.
translations.sv: Du pratar om tjejen från kaféet.
translations.ro: Vorbești despre fata de la cafenea.
translations.cs: Mluvíš o té holce z kavárny.
translations.da: Du taler om pigen fra caféen.
translations.ja: カフェの女の子の話をしている。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Main verb in present 2nd person singular.
Preposition introducing the complement 'la nana du café'.
Feminine singular definite article marking the noun 'nana' as definite.
Noun head of the NP governed by 'de'.
Contraction of preposition 'de' and masculine singular definite article 'le' introducing 'café'.
Noun head of the prepositional complement; specifies the place associated with 'nana'.

sentences.target: J'ai vu une nana au concert.

translations.fr: J'ai vu une nana au concert.
translations.en: I saw a girl at the concert.
translations.es: Vi a una chica en el concierto.
translations.de: Ich habe ein Mädchen beim Konzert gesehen.
translations.it: Ho visto una ragazza al concerto.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在演唱会上看到一个女孩。
translations.yue: 我喺演唱會見到一個女仔。
translations.pt: Eu vi uma garota no concerto.
translations.vi: Tôi đã thấy một cô gái ở buổi hòa nhạc.
translations.nl: Ik zag een meisje bij het concert.
translations.hi: मैंने कॉन्सर्ट में एक लड़की को देखा.
translations.nb: Jeg så en jente på konserten.
translations.id: Saya melihat seorang cewek di konser.
translations.sv: Jag såg en tjej på konserten.
translations.ro: Am văzut o fată la concert.
translations.cs: Viděl jsem na koncertě jednu holku.
translations.da: Jeg så en pige til koncerten.
translations.ja: コンサートで女の子を見た。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun elided before vowel-initial auxiliary.
Auxiliary forming the passé composé; 1st person singular present.
Past participle of the main verb 'voir' governed by the auxiliary 'ai'.
Feminine singular indefinite article modifying 'nana'.
Direct object noun of 'voir'.
Contraction of preposition 'à' and masculine singular definite article 'le' introducing 'concert'.
Noun head of the prepositional complement indicating location.

sentences.target: La nana de Paul arrive vers huit heures.
sentences.reading: /la nana də pɔl aʁiv vɛʁ ɥit œʁ/

translations.fr: La nana de Paul arrive vers huit heures.
translations.ipa: /la nana də pɔl aʁiv vɛʁ ɥit œʁ/
translations.en: Paul's girlfriend is arriving around eight.
translations.es: La novia de Paul llega sobre las ocho.
translations.it: La ragazza di Paul arriva verso le otto.
translations.zh-Hans: 保罗的女朋友大概八点左右到。
translations.yue: Paul 嘅女朋友大約八點到。
translations.pt: A namorada do Paul chega por volta das oito.
translations.he: החברה של פול מגיעה בסביבות שמונה.
translations.tr: Paul'un kız arkadaşı sekiz gibi geliyor.
translations.vi: Bạn gái của Paul sẽ đến vào khoảng tám giờ.
translations.ar: صديقة بول ستصل حوالي الساعة الثامنة.
translations.nl: Pauls vriendin komt rond acht uur.
translations.uk: Дівчина Пола приїде приблизно о восьмій.
translations.hi: पॉल की गर्लफ्रेंड लगभग आठ बजे आएगी.
translations.el: Η κοπέλα του Πολ θα έρθει γύρω στις οκτώ.
translations.nb: Pauls kjæreste kommer rundt klokka åtte.
translations.id: Pacarnya Paul akan datang sekitar jam delapan.
translations.sv: Pauls flickvän kommer runt klockan åtta.
translations.ro: Iubita lui Paul sosește pe la ora opt.
translations.da: Pauls kæreste kommer omkring klokken otte.
translations.fi: Paulin tyttöystävä saapuu noin kello kahδεksan.
translations.ja: ポールの彼女は八時ごろに到着します。

tokens.explanation: Feminine singular definite article marking 'nana' as definite.
Subject noun of the clause.
Preposition introducing a genitival complement.
Proper noun complement to 'de', specifying possession/association.
Main verb, present 3rd person singular.
Preposition expressing approximation in time.
Cardinal numeral modifying 'heures'.
Plural noun denoting time; complement of 'vers'.
